stories.title: NBA free agency is here! Live updates on deals, tr...
stories.summary: We're tracking deals, trades, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including the latest on Norman Powell, Marcus Smart and LeBron James.

stories.title: Toronto goes all-in for Kawhi Leonard: Grading the...
stories.summary: Can Toronto make a run in the East with Kawhi Leonard? Will LA make more moves?

stories.title: Sources: Smart, Rockets agree to 2-year deal
stories.summary: Free agent guard Marcus Smart has agreed on a two-year, $13 million deal with the Houston Rockets, plus a player option for the second season, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Sources: Powell lands 2-yr., $45M deal with Bulls
stories.summary: Free-agent guard Norman Powell has agreed to a two-year, $45 million deal with join the Chicago Bulls, sources tell ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Serena hurt knee vs. Joint, trying to play doubles...
stories.summary: Serena Williams' status to play in women's doubles at Wimbledon is uncertain after she suffered a knee injury during her first singles match in nearly four years.
